belongs_to_collection.name: Two People With Excellent Compatibility In Body And Mind. "Feelings" And "lips" Overlap In This Deep Kissing Soapland.

response.original_title: 身も心も相性抜群の2人ー。 ”想い”と”唇”が重なる濃密接吻ソープ 七海ティナ
response.overview: Tina is a new prostitute working at a high-class soapland. Feeling lonely in her estranged marriage, she desperately longs for even a fleeting moment of intimacy, even if it's a lie. One day, a young man named Shinohara comes to see Tina. His simple and gentle nature makes Tina start treating him not just as a prostitute, but as a woman. As their tongues intertwine and their lips meet, filled with emotion, their relationship begins to deepen...
response.title: JUR-588 Two People With Excellent Compatibility In Body And Mind. "Feelings" And "lips" Overlap In This Deep Kissing Soapland. Tina Nanami
